steps.title: Use the starting time
steps.content: When the flask was placed on the counter, $t=0$. Substitute $0$ into the function.

steps.title: Evaluate the function
steps.content:
Use the exponent rule that any positive base to the zero power is $1$.
$$g(0)=289+(355-289)(2.72)^0=289+66=355$$The answer is 355.
